description:

leadguitarist!Sukuna x Nerd!Reader

Posting twice in one day…call me batman or sum idk

anyway, basic info - The band name is CRIMSIN (it’s prolly corny i’m so sorry) the members are Sukuna, Toji, Choso, Suguru and Satoru, (suguru and satoru are secretly dating bc I said so—if u don’t like it ur homophobic.)

-They all go to the same college, whatever that college may be is up to you 😏

- Sukuna is the lead guitarist, Choso plays the keyboard, Gojo is main vocalist, Toji is the bassist, Getos the drummer.

That should be everything so ya enjoy may the odds be ever in your favor mwahhh😚🫶
